summary: Tested 7 bug fixes in Trend Syria app: API return types, ImageUploader, phone field padding, password eye icon, title text, location button position, and Sham Cash character limit
critical_code_review_comments: Phone field has pr-14 padding - number visible
Password eye icon has z-10 and proper positioning
ImageUploader X button calls onChange with empty files array
ImageUploader colors: green when uploaded, red when not
Title text changed to 'انضم لعائلة ترند سورية'
Sham Cash input has no maxLength attribute
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 bug fixes verified: 1) Phone number visible in registration (pr-14 padding), 2) ImageUploader X button works with proper colors, 3) Title text updated, 4) Location button moved up, 5) Sham Cash no character limit, 6) Password eye icon positioned correctly with z-10, 7) Admin APIs return proper list types

issue_1_phone_hidden.details: Phone input has pr-14 padding (48px), number '0912345678' clearly visible

issue_2_image_uploader.details: X button calls onChange({target:{files:[]}}), colors: green when uploaded, red when not

issue_3_title_text.details: Title changed to 'انضم لعائلة ترند سورية' in JoinAsFoodSellerPage.js line 483

issue_4_location_button.details: GoogleMapsLocationPicker moved above address button in JoinAsFoodSellerPage.js line 745

issue_5_shamcash_limit.details: Sham Cash input in WithdrawModal.js has no maxLength attribute

issue_6_password_eye.details: Eye button has z-10 class, password fields have pl-12 padding

issue_7_admin_api.details: Both /api/admin/sellers/pending and /api/admin/delivery/pending return proper list types
